overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from a wizarding school setting, showing students in dark robes moving through a high-ceilinged common room with stone walls and wooden beams. Sunlight streams through large arched windows, illuminating the medieval interior as NPCs walk, converse, and sit at wooden tables.

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place in a high-ceilinged medieval common room with stone walls and curved wooden beams overhead. Sunlight streams through large arched windows on the left, illuminating the wooden dining tables where several students in dark wizard robes are seated. Throughout the segment, a group of students enters from the left side and walks toward the center, gathering near the tables to converse, while the camera remains stationary observing the activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric view of a medieval common room where the stillness of the architecture is gradually animated by the arrival of students. It begins with a wide observation of the high-ceilinged space, emphasizing the contrast between the heavy stone walls, curved wooden beams, and the bright sunlight streaming through large arched windows. As the light illuminates the wooden dining tables, the quiet environment shifts when a group of students in dark wizard robes enters from the left. The scene then focuses on this movement as the students migrate toward the center of the room, gathering near the tables to converse and filling the cavernous interior with activity.
